ValidationRule.description: Prevents changes to applications that are already in a terminal status.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(ISNEW()), OR( TEXT(PRIORVALUE(Application_Status__c)) = "Rejected", TEXT(PRIORVALUE(Application_Status__c)) = "Withdrawn" ), TEXT(Application_Status__c) <> TEXT(PRIORVALUE(Application_Status__c)) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Applications that are Rejected or Withdrawn cannot be changed.
